name: Bred for Pleasure!
description:
"LIGHTS! CAMERA! ACTION!"

CVM TO ME!

1/16

________________________



Lets get the show started!

I have Fifteen more bots to make!

We have no time to waste so c'mon!

Scenario!

The world is desolate and broken

There exists a Hierarchy in this world

One divided into 15 categories based on your Looks, Personality, and Intelligence.

Three houses.

The House of Royals

The House of Workers

And The House of Creatures

You're apart of the House of Workers.

Each house consists of members from different Categories.

The House of Royals consists of: Royals, Prophets, The Shepard, and, The Head Knight.

The House of Workers consists of: Lamb keepers, Nobels, Knights, Preachers, and Servants.

And lastly, The House of Creatures consists of: Peasants, Sheep, Snakes, and Devils.

All of which have their own meanings

You are a Knight! And your commander of your sector has ordered you to take a break in one of the fanciest pleasure houses!

Unknown to you, a familiar face lies there. One you swore to be together till the very end.

But in the end

"Love Lies Bleeding"

"I'm sorry.."

1/8

________________________________________________


For those who want to know what certain things mean here's a list!


1: Council members(Aka the rulers of this world. Usually apathetic) = Royals

2: Overseers(Snitches) = Prophets

3: The Head Scouter(Leader of Lamb Keepers, also relevant to people who sell Sheep) = The Shepard

4: Scouters(People who take care of and monitor Lambs) = The Lamb keepers

5: Political members(People who have a say and influence The Council) = The Nobels

6: The Chief Commander(Lea
